subcodes.title: Words to a Christian Scientist, spoken on 1912-11-14
subcodes.first_line: By saying there is no evil in existence is meant that what has come from the Origin of existence and being is good and useful. It is good in its time and place and not evil.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراد از اینکه در وجود شر نیست اینست که انچه از مبدء عالم هستی و وجود است مفید است
subcodes.subjects: @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @perfection; imperfection of nature, @law of transformation and change, @things are known by their opposites
